Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import openpyxl
path = "/Users/geovanidanielnolasco/Documents/Demos/Monitor redes/politic_report_2026-03-04_17.21.xlsx"
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(path, read_only=True\)

# Get ALL numerical data
ws = wb['Datos numéricos']
print\("=== DATOS NUMÉRICOS ==="\)
for r in ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\):
    if any\(v is not None for v in r\):
        print\(r\)

# Get ALL mentions
ws2 = wb['Menciones']
print\("\\n=== TODAS LAS MENCIONES ==="\)
count = 0
for r in ws2.iter_rows\(values_only=True\):
    if any\(v is not None for v in r\):
        print\(r\)
        count += 1
        if count > 60:
            break
EOF)

Bash(cat "/Users/geovanidanielnolasco/.claude/projects/-Users-geovanidanielnolasco-Documents-Demos-Monitor-redes/ca2d2431-96a6-4b33-80f6-bea699a5cfef.jsonl" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\)
print\(f'Total lines: {len\(lines\)}'\)
# Check structure of first few lines
for line in lines[:3]:
    try:
        data = json.loads\(line\)
        print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:1000]\)
        print\('==='\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
        print\(repr\(line[:200]\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(cat "/Users/geovanidanielnolasco/.claude/projects/-Users-geovanidanielnolasco-Documents-Demos-Monitor-redes/ca2d2431-96a6-4b33-80f6-bea699a5cfef.jsonl" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\)
# Get user messages to understand the conversation flow
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    try:
        data = json.loads\(line\)
        msg = data.get\('message', {}\)
        role = msg.get\('role', data.get\('type', ''\)\)
        content = msg.get\('content', ''\)
        if role == 'user' and isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 20:
            print\(f'Line {i} [user]: {content[:600]}'\)
            print\('---'\)
    except:
        pass
" 2>/dev/null)
